touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn connection request sent to Mason Watson, Head of RevOps at AtlasSphere. Mentioned helping mid-market SaaS companies streamline onboarding automation. No response received.

Cold email to Mason introducing our onboarding automation solution. Highlighted ROI metrics from similar vertical SaaS companies. Mason replied expressing interest in learning more about reducing onboarding time.

questions_asked.question: What kind of timeline reduction have you seen with similar companies?
questions_asked.answer: Our vertical SaaS customers typically see 40-60% reduction in onboarding time, with some achieving full automation of tier-1 workflows within 90 days.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sharing case study from comparable vertical SaaS company. Mason confirmed their current onboarding process is manual and taking 45+ days. Mentioned they're evaluating a few solutions including Clari.

questions_asked.question: How does your approach differ from Clari's revenue platform?
questions_asked.answer: While Clari focuses on forecasting and pipeline visibility, we specialize in workflow automation and onboarding orchestration. Many customers use both - Clari for analytics, us for execution.

touches.ai_summary: Sent competitive comparison and pricing framework overview. Mason acknowledged receipt and mentioned he's new to the Head of RevOps role (3 months in) and wants to make the right decision for his first major tool investment.

questions_asked.question: Do you have customers who've implemented this within their first year in a RevOps leadership role?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, several. We actually find newer leaders benefit most because they can build processes correctly from the start rather than retrofitting legacy systems.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: 11-minute discovery call with Mason. Discussed AtlasSphere's current onboarding challenges, tech stack, and team size. Mason shared they're growing quickly (734 employees, adding 27 RevOps/Sales seats) and need automation to scale. Confirmed budget authority sits with CEO Yuki Allen.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency to solve this now?
questions_asked.answer: We're planning to double our sales team in Q3 and our current manual onboarding process won't scale. I need something in place before then.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: For a 27-seat deployment with consulting, typically 6-8 weeks from contract signature to full rollout.

touches.ai_summary: 48-minute product demo with Mason (originally scheduled for last week but rescheduled). Walked through onboarding automation workflows, integrations with their existing CRM, and consulting engagement model. Mason was engaged and asked detailed technical questions. Mentioned Clari came up in their leadership meeting but serves a different need.

questions_asked.question: Can your system integrate with our Salesforce instance without custom dev work?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have a native Salesforce connector that handles standard and custom objects. The consulting package includes configuration and mapping.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this?
questions_asked.answer: I'll need to loop in Yuki, our CEO, for final sign-off. She controls budget for anything over $25K.

questions_asked.question: What does the automations_plus_consulting package include exactly?
questions_asked.answer: You get the automation platform, 27 seats, plus 40 hours of implementation consulting to build custom workflows and train your team.

next_steps: Send demo recording and ROI calculator

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Mason with demo recording, ROI analysis, and implementation plan. Mason confirmed he's presenting to Yuki this week and wants a formal proposal to share. Requested pricing breakdown and reference customer contacts.

questions_asked.question: Can you include 2-3 references from similar-sized vertical SaaS companies?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. I'll connect you with our customers at ChartPath and VendorIQ - both mid-market vertical SaaS with similar use cases.

touches.ai_summary: Introductory email to Yuki Allen (CEO) with proposal for $26,800 ACV automations_plus_consulting package. Highlighted strategic value and Mason's sponsorship. Yuki responded asking for a pricing call to discuss terms and explore potential discount for annual prepayment.
next_steps: Schedule pricing call with Mason and Yuki

touches.ai_summary: 16-minute pricing call with Mason. Discussed contract terms, payment options, and implementation timeline. Mason mentioned Clari quoted them slightly lower for their platform but acknowledged it doesn't include onboarding automation. Pushed for 15% discount to match budget constraints.

questions_asked.question: If we commit to annual prepayment, what discount can you offer?
questions_asked.answer: For annual prepay, we can offer 10% off the ACV, bringing it to $24,120.

questions_asked.question: Is the Clari deal still active or have you decided to focus on onboarding automation?
questions_asked.answer: We're probably doing both but staggered. Clari for Q2, this for Q3 if we can get the numbers right.

objections: Pricing is at the top of our approved budget range - need to see if we can get closer to $23K to have room for Clari later
next_steps: Check with leadership on additional discount

touches.ai_summary: 11-minute pricing call with Mason. Confirmed approval for 12% discount ($23,584 ACV) with annual prepayment and signed SOW. Mason committed to getting contract through legal review this week. Discussed Q3 kickoff timeline and assigned implementation consultant.

questions_asked.question: When can we start implementation if we sign by end of week?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off the first week of the following month with your dedicated consultant.

questions_asked.question: Do you need Yuki to review the revised terms or can you move forward?
questions_asked.answer: I have authority up to $25K with annual commit, so we're good. I'll route to legal and get this back to you by Friday.
